item.message: Skill descriptions were shortened to fit the 2% skills context budget. Codex can still see every skill, but some descriptions are shorter. Disable unused skills or plugins to leave more room for the rest.

item.text: I’ll use only the procdork MCP to locate the chat summary mart, inspect its description, and run a read-only comparison query. I’ll reproduce the returned chart Markdown and key facts exactly as provided.

arguments.sql: SELECT 'session_count' AS metric, session_count AS count FROM mart_chat_summary UNION ALL SELECT 'message_count', message_count FROM mart_chat_summary UNION ALL SELECT 'event_count', event_count FROM mart_chat_summary UNION ALL SELECT 'cited_source_count', cited_source_count FROM mart_chat_summary

item.text:
The available chat summary mart is `procdork_analytics.main.mart_chat_summary`, a base table containing:

- Count metrics: `session_count`, `message_count`, `event_count`, `cited_source_count` (`BIGINT`, nullable)
- Time bounds: `first_session_at`, `last_session_at` (`TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE`, nullable)

Chat Summary Count Metrics
